sources.modifications: Renamed fork extended into a local-first presentation platform.
Contracts and normalization were independently rewritten for this repository.
Reduced to a stable CLI/library boundary and a versioned MotionAnalysis output.
Converted manual SVG guidance into a typed graph renderer and validator.

Ported scene, mask, asset-slot, and provider boundaries under visual/, extended with letterbox-safe prepare/restore edits, the A1/A2/B layer-route contract (validated metrics, masked A2 composite, default overlap grouping), deterministic white/black edge-contamination checks, protected-region placement, a contained evidence-bundle builder, and the non-network visual CLI -- all original work in this repository adapting the upstream technique, with no upstream binary copied. Imported the style prompt library and example recipes byte-for-byte under resources/gpt-image2-ppt-skills/ (32 styles/*.md + 32 *.layouts.json = 256 layouts, six recipes/*/recipe.md + slides_plan.md, and the upstream LICENSE), recorded in resources/gpt-image2-ppt-skills/MANIFEST.json. examples/visual-reconstruction/ is an original synthetic reconstruction example inspired by the upstream Apache technique. Normalization into the typed StyleProfile/LayoutProfile/Recipe registry contracts and generated metadata is original work in packages/style-registry.

Reimplemented applicable package validation, repair findings, native shape compatibility, transition XML, and HTML/XML test invariants in TypeScript. Corrected invalid upstream preset names and the p:reveal namespace defect. No Rust source is vendored.
